cvs.description:

benefit from more experience in order to progress towards positions of responsibility, particularly in the areas of Quality Control and Assurance, Research and Development,
production, projects and other areas of application in the Agri-food industry
cvs.diplomas: [{"id":1926595144,"text":"food engineer and Biochemist"},{"id":1570386814,"text":"Bottler Sensory Leader delivered by Flavor Activ"},{"id":4202638395,"text":"Basic Strengthening Program Laboratory Operations Capabilities by Coca cola expert of Ballina laboratory"}]
cvs.experiences:
[{"id":322948610,"title":"jobs description","description":"

- Carrying out physicochemical, microbiological and sensory analyzes of raw materials, in production and our finished products (Elena tomato tomato, Ngwan salt, Dethom sugar, cubes and Top taste sticks, bambi Gold spreadable chocolate, chewable chocolate bambi with milk, chocomalt, Béta margarine, Mandel, Sangokou and Dis-moi biscuits, cakes and from factories and monitoring of physical parameters in the maturation and packaging rooms of Finished products. - Preparation of solutions used in water treatment and monitoring of physical parameters - chemical tests of the station's water internally and externally by a reference laboratory. - Participation in research and development work through the development of new recipes or improved product recipes (tomato concentrates, chocolate and derivatives, cube broths and sticks, margarines, mayonnaise and biscuits, confectionery products, etc.). Work with experts and service providers as part of the establishment and operation of the Laboratory in charge of research and development.

","start":"2015-09-01","end":"2020-12-19"},{"id":2498227713,"title":"Head of Quality Control Laboratory and Culinary Laboratory (Research and Product Development) at NEW FOODS Co. (Foods Processing Industry","description":"

Management of physico-chemical laboratories (quality control) and research and Development of NEW FOODS Co. - Work on projects to improve existing products and develop new ones products. - Management of a team of 10 quality control laboratory technicians (physico-chemistry and microbiology analysts ) and research and development (Culinary and sweet products laboratory). - Processing and writing daily, monthly and quarterly summary reports - Reporting of the results of the department's activities during technical and management committee meetings - Stock management of consumables and materials used…etc

","start":"2020-12-20","end":"2022-10-17"},{"id":2829965848,"title":"Laboratories Manager, Quality System and Capability at COCA COLA SOFAVIN GABON BOTTLING COMPANY","description":"

Ensure control operations of raw materials, products being manufactured and Finished products. Ensure the management of non-compliant products (search for causes and actions fixes). Establish control plans using the HACCP approach and in compliance with legal requirements and that of the partner COCA COLA, ensuring their applicability. Interpret and analyze the results, give the instructions to follow in the event of hazards to minimize production downtime while guaranteeing product quality. Write the implementation of internal procedures for the tests and controls to be carried out in accordance with the plan and manage quality control processes; Integrate changes in requirements that may have a impact on the process. Ensure the training of laboratory technicians enabling them to carry out analyzes according to established procedures and obtain reliable data; Facilitate training and coaching on themes such as: Good hygiene and manufacturing practices as well as Good Laboratory practices. Manage the classification and archiving of all results of the factory's quality and traceability system. Work on projects to improve existing products and develop new ones products, Develop and manage quality dashboards, edit them periodically and transmit them to The direction. Ensure and ensure a working environment that complies with internal requirements and those of COCA COLA by coordinating and validating cleaning, CIP and syrup production activities.

","start":"2022-10-18","end":"2024-02-29"}]

cvs.experiences:
[{"id":952301920,"title":"(Sep 2020 - December 2022) Associate – Manufacturing, EBP and NFP | Audit","description":"

Grant Thornton US LLP, Bangalore, India
(Sep 2020 - December 2022) Associate – Manufacturing, EBP and NFP | Audit
• Executed financial statement audits, reviews, and compilations for clients in various industries, including manufacturing, technology, not-for-profits and real estate.
• Conducted substantive testing, risk assessment, and internal control evaluations to identify and mitigate potential issues.
• Stayed up to date with the latest accounting and auditing standards, contributing to the firm's continuous improvement and innovation efforts.
• Assisted in budget preparation for the audit year, drafting MRL’s, EL’s, and delegation of duties of an engagement to various team members as guided by the manager while adhering to CLEARR values.
• Gained proficiency in auditing software and tools, such as IDEA, TBeam, Leap, Voyager, PowerBI, etc. and leveraged them to streamline audit procedures.
• Collaborated with team members to complete audit engagements within budgeted timeframes while maintaining the highest level of audit quality and Grant Thornton standards.

","start":"2021-09-13","end":"2022-12-05"},{"id":2975857544,"title":"(December 2022 – Present) Audit Staff II – Technology Niche | Audit","description":"

Withum Smith+Brown, PC., Bangalore, India
(December 2022 – Present) Audit Staff II – Technology Niche | Audit
• Assisted in the preparation of financial statements in compliance with relevant accounting principles and regulations.
• Conducted financial statement audits for a diverse clientele, including publicly traded and privately held companies, in accordance with generally accepted auditing standards (GAAS).
• Demonstrated proficiency in applying the latest accounting principles, industry regulations, and auditing standards to ensure compliance.
• Led and managed audit teams, providing guidance and mentorship to junior staff while maintaining a commitment to delivering high-quality work.
• Identified and documented control weaknesses, risks, and deficiencies in clients' internal control systems, providing recommendations for improvement.
• Developed strong client relationships by delivering excellent customer service, maintaining open communication, and proactively addressing client needs and concerns.
• Prepared and presented comprehensive audit reports to clients and engaged in constructive discussions to address audit findings and provide actionable insights.
• Provided training to the freshers and the experienced audit professionals on various areas of the audits.
• Supported audit planning, risk assessment, and client relationship management, contributing to increased client satisfaction and retention.
• Utilized audit tools such as DAS (AI) Kira (AI) and CCH and data analytics tools to extract and analyze financial data, enhancing audit efficiency and accuracy, received multiple WITHUM BUCKS for exceptional client services.

","start":"2022-12-09","end":"2024-03-21"}]

cvs.title: Ressource Humaine Professionnelle
cvs.description:
Coordonner la logistique de la prestation de formation, ce qui comprend la supervision de toutes les activités connexes. Gérer 
l'ensemble du processus pour les cours de langue, de l'inscription et du suivi à la gestion des factures.
Collecter et organiser toute la documentation nécessaire requise pour les demandes de financement gouvernemental (INFPC). 
Assurer un partenariat productif avec le fournisseur pour atteindre les objectifs de demande de financement. Tenir des 
registres précis et des données en utilisant LMS SuccessFactors.
Aider l'équipe dans la préparation de présentations. Évaluer les données à travers des tableaux de bord et des outils de suivi 
de la formation, tels que Success Factors et SAP. Gérer efficacement et entretenir des relations avec différents départements, 
notamment l'Administration, les Achats, les Systèmes d'Information des Ressources Humaines (HRIS), les équipes 
universitaires et les prestataires de services

COMPETENCES

•	Traitement des factures  fournisseurs, clients, encodage et classement comptables et bancaires, trésorerie, aide comptabilité générale pour bilan, notes de frais, gestion des comptes clients secteur Nord-Est France, Luxembourg et Belgique, Multiline, gestion de contrats, préparation salle de réunions, gestion pointage employés, congés, maladie, visite médicale
•	Gestion des soumissions, encodage tableaux Excel, décomptes
•	Prises de commandes et établissements de devis, gestion du matériel, courriers, envoi colis et lettres , fax, accueil, scanning, copies, ouverture d’offre de leasing
•	Gestion du contentieux et recouvrement (mises en Demeure, ordonnances de paiements, titres exécutoires et dossiers avocats, faillites, relances des impayés clients)
•	Gestion des annonces pour offre d’emploi, classement, téléphone, préparation des salles de réunion, tâches administratives incluant l'élaboration de compte rendu, envoi mailing pour demande de subvention, réalisation, gestion de l’archivage informatique 5000 plans (Excel)
•	Application du règlement intérieur et de la sécurité du bâtiment, presse, organisation fêtes
•	Ouverture des dossiers sinistres toutes branches, instructions et gestions des dossiers automobile, habitation, hospitalisation et bris de glace, relances clients, règlements et clôtures
